title: Backing Up Your Data
drDigitalIntro:
A backup is a copy of your files kept somewhere safe.
• If your device breaks or is stolen, a backup restores everything.
• Back up automatically to an external drive or the cloud.
• The rule is 3-2-1: 3 copies, 2 types of storage, 1 offsite.

steps.say: Turn on Automatic Backups so your files are always protected.

drDigitalSuccess: Automatic backups are on! Your files will be saved regularly — if anything goes wrong, you can restore them.
drDigitalHint: Find the Storage section, then flip the Automatic Backups switch to On.
